channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Epiphone SG EB-0 Bass Guitar - Cherry — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Brand New · Maxwell's House of Music

Authorized by Gibson, with the EB-0 Electric Bass, Epiphone has brought back a classic bass guitar of the early '60s. Based on the SG, this guitar-sized (30-1/2" scale) electric bass is a great axe for anyone not quite large enough for a full-size bass. Though small and light, the Epiphone EB-0 Bass has huge sound, and full-size people can play it too.

Features

  • Re-creation of a '60s classic authorized by Gibson
  • Based on the SG with 30-1/2" scale
  • Great axe for anyone not quite large enough for a full-sized bass
  • Small and light
  • Sidewinder Humbucker Pickups
  • Chrome Hardware
  • Nut Width: 1.50"
  • Mahogany, Bolt-on neck
  • Rosewood Fingerboard
  • Dot inlay
  • Mahogany body



Welcome to the #1 music store in the Louisville, KY and Southern Indiana area! Home of the world-renowned Guitar Emporium and social media series titled, “If You're In A Band”, Maxwell's House of Music is an award-winning music retail and education resource! NAMM international awards include: 2024 Dealer of the Year, 2024 Innovation Award, 2022 Best Store Design, and named a Top 100 Dealer every year for over a decade! Shop online or visit our 12,500 sq ft music superstore in Jeffersonville, Indiana! Please call us if you have any questions. 812-283-3304

item.title: Ibanez Ergodyne — $240
item.description:
$240 · Good · Delaware Music Center

Pre-owned Ibanez Ergodyne bass guitar with a Luthite body. It's missing a knob and has several noticeable marks and scratches as pictured.

item.title: STR Bass LS449 — $1,600
item.description:
$1,600 · Very Good · Aaron 's Gear Locker

this is a Japanese made STR Guitars 4 string bass with 1 passive music man style pickup.

the neck is straight, the truss rod works perfectly, the action is low and can be adjusted very low. headstock is slightly tilted. fingerboard radius is about 12".

bass is in great condition with the exception of a few imperfections on the back side which are shown in a photograph.

will only ship within the continental U.S. shipping within the continental U.S. is included in the price.

the weight is 7.6lbs and comes with the original STR soft gig bag.

please feel free to message me for any questions you may have..

item.title: Epiphone Thunderbird 4-String Electric Bass — $399
item.description:
$399 · Very Good · Atomic Music

This is a pre-owned/used instrument available as shown for local delivery, pickup at our storefront (curbside or in store) in Beltsville, Maryland, or shipment to those in the lower 48/USA only via UPS Ground [a signature will be required for delivery]*.

  • Its electronics have been tested and function 100% as they should.
  • See the provided pix for best idea of overall cosmetic condition. As it is pre-owned, it has acquired surface marks and wear (dings, dents, scratches, scuffs, smudges, etc.) from play/use - all purely cosmetic in nature. There are no issues to note with regard to functionality and playability.
  • A generic gig bag [not pictured] will be included.  No other extras are available for this item.
  • This listing has been created for the benefit of our local customers.  There may be cosmetic or functional issues that the pictures alone cannot capture — if you are not able to come by and inspect this instrument in person, please be sure to ask any relevant questions you may have regarding its condition, playability, etc. before buying.

* Please be aware that humidity, temperature, and handling can affect guitars & basses such that adjustments to the instrument might be needed post-shipment. This includes "fret sprout" (as wood can shrink/swell during shipment, a fretted instrument may arrive with sharp fret edges). If tweaking action, intonation, etc., having fret edges dressed, or having the instrument set up to your specs is not something you are comfortable with doing yourself, you will need the help of a local-to-you tech/professional. Note that any associated fees incurred for their time and labor will be your responsibility.

Please contact us to discuss any other questions you may have about it before clicking the "Add To Cart" button!


Atomic Music store hours:  12pm - 6pm, EST, Monday - Saturday & 12pm - 5pm, EST, Sundays.

Thanks!!

- Atomic Music

item.title: Fender Bullet Bass 1982 - Red — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · BTE Gear Emporium

Time capsule here - mom bought for my brother in ‘82 when he wanted to be like Sting who had this bass. He didn’t put 5hrs on this guitar before giving up. Some oxidation on metal parts but no scratches and comes with original Fender dropout case and strap.

item.title: Yamaha RBX370A Early 2000s - Matt Grey — $295.91
item.description:
$295.91 · Good · Adam W

This was my first bass back in the early 2000’s. Gigged many times. It’s a great starter bass. Been in the case for the last 20 years. Will need some TLC but it’s still pretty good. A few dings and dents as expected.

item.title: Epiphone Thunderbird IV 1999 - 2020 - Natural Satin — $300
item.description:
$300 · Very Good · Pawn 1 Bremerton

used bass

passive

no case

missing washer for input jack

item.title: Dean Edge 09 4-String Bass Guitar 2010s - Satin Natural — $73
item.description:
$73 · Poor · Rafael's Gear Bazaar

This is a Dean edge 09 E09M 4-string electric bass guitar w/ satin natural mahogany finish has blemishes as shown but that doesn’t effect its performance

item.title: Hagstrom Swede Bass Patch 2000 - Walnut - 1976 — $999.95
item.description:
$999.95 · Very Good · Love of Fuzz

  • Very Good Condition
  • Mahogany Body
  • Mahogany Neck
  • Ebony Fretboard
  • Hagstrom Humbucker Pickups with Three Way Pickup / Tone Switch
  • 7-Pole DIN Output Designed to Connect Directly to Ampeg Patch 2000 Footswitch (Not Included)
  • Includes Hardshell Case

item.title: Gibson Explorer 1985 — $1,250
item.description:
$1,250 · Good · Delaware Music Center

1985 Gibson Explorer bass. Comes with the original hard case. Both the case and the bass have many noticeable marks and scratches. On the back of the body of the bass there are significant scratches and at the lowest point on the body it is scratched and slightly chipped. There is a noticeable mark on the back of the neck behind the first fret.

item.title: Crews Maniac Sound NPB Custom 2017 MIJ – Capri Orange – Boutique P-Style w/ Case — $2,087.41
item.description:
$2,087.41 · Excellent · Gruuvik Chamber

Description

Crews Maniac Sound NPB Custom from 2017, built in Japan by a respected Tokyo boutique workshop known for high-end custom instruments and precise craftsmanship.

This is a custom-built Precision-style bass with a modern boutique execution. While visually rooted in the classic P-Bass formula, the instrument reflects a higher level of refinement in materials, construction, and overall feel compared to standard production models.

The alder body paired with a maple neck and fingerboard delivers a tight low end, articulate attack, and focused midrange presence. The instrument resonates well acoustically, indicating a well-selected and properly aged wood set.

Crews’ proprietary spiral bridge design contributes to improved sustain and a slightly firmer string tension feel, enhancing note definition and consistency across the register.

Overall, a clean, no-nonsense boutique P-style bass — built with intention, not marketing.

Specifications

Model: NPB Custom
Year: 2017
Country of manufacture: Japan
Serial number: 170010
Weight: 4.1 kg
Nut width: approx. 43 mm

Body: 2-piece alder
Neck: maple
Fingerboard: maple (satin feel)
Pickups: Crews TYPE P-style split coil
Electronics: passive (Volume, Tone)

Bridge: Crews spiral bridge
Tuners: Gotoh GB-29 (reverse wind)
Hardware: nickel / chrome

Strings: new Pyramid Black Tape Nylon Set 648/1

Condition

Excellent condition.

Finish is clean and highly preserved throughout.
Neck is straight and stable.
Frets show no noticeable wear.
Electronics fully functional.

Included

Original Crews hard case
Original documents

Notes

Custom-order Crews instruments are produced in relatively small numbers and are not commonly found on the European market.

This example is a well-documented custom build, complete with original paperwork and matching serial details, supporting its authenticity and factory origin.

Shipping

Ships from the European Union (Estonia). No import duties for EU buyers.

The instrument will be carefully packed to ensure safe transit and shipped via a tracked courier service.

Fully insured and/or express shipping options (DHL, UPS, FedEx) are available upon request.

Minor setup adjustments may be required after climate adaptation.

Additional Information

Please feel free to message with any questions or if additional photographs are required.

More soul-approved vintage Japanese and handpicked basses available — no hype, just the good ones.

item.title: G&L Tribute Series Fallout Bass 2020s - Surf Green — $999.99
item.description:
$999.99 · Very Good · Pawn 1 Bremerton

G&L climax bass amber burst

very clean bass

no case

not sure exact model

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1992 - Black MIM — $549
item.description:
$549 · Good · Copper Chord Music

Up for sale is a Fender Jazz Bass made in Mexico finished in Black.

We recently cleaned the bass, installed a fresh set of strings, and professionally set it up here in our shop. It plays very well with comfortable action and is ready for its next owner.

This bass delivers everything players expect from a Jazz Bass—fast, comfortable playability with articulate, punchy tone that works equally well for rock, blues, funk, worship, country, and countless other styles. It has also been fitted with a set of Schaller tuning machines, a respected upgrade known for their smooth operation and excellent tuning stability.

Cosmetically, the bass is in good overall condition with normal signs of use from years of playing, including light scratches, small dings, and finish wear consistent with its age. Nothing stands out as excessive, and it presents well overall.

Please note that one of the tuner bushings is missing. The tuner remains functional, but a replacement bushing would be recommended. Additionally, the volume and tone controls are fitted with Fender Strat-style knobs rather than the traditional Jazz Bass knobs.

The frets show only light wear, the electronics function properly, and the bass is ready to gig or record immediately.

Please review all photos carefully for the complete cosmetic condition.

Case: N/A

Scale Length: 34“

Nut Width: 1.5“

Fret Wear: 9/10

Action at 12F (6th): .1“

Action at 12F (1st): .08“

Weight: 8lbs 15oz

Overall Condition: 7.5/10


Internal Use (Bin) - Floor

item.title: Ibanez GSR200-BK Gio Soundgear with Active EQ 2004 - Present - Black — $249.99
item.description:
$249.99 · Brand New · Woody's Music of Rock Hill

The Ibanez GSR200 is a budget-friendly, full-size solid-body electric bass in Ibanez’s GSR/Gio Soundgear series, designed for beginners and players seeking SR-level quality at an entry-level price. Introduced in 2004, it has been produced in Indonesia and China, with updates over the years including body material changes, pickup upgrades, and new finishes.

SPECS

  • neck type GSR4 Maple neck
  • top/back/body Poplar body
  • fretboard Jatoba fretboard White dot inlay
  • fret Medium frets
  • bridge B10 bridge
  • string space19mm
  • neck pickup Dynamix P neck pickup Passive
  • bridge pickup Dynamix J bridge pickup Passive
  • equalizer Phat II EQ
  • factory tuning 1G,2D,3A,4E
  • string gauge .045/.065/.080/.100
  • hardware color Chrome

item.title: ESP LTD Phoenix-1004 2021 - Black Satin — $770
item.description:
$770 · Very Good · Bad Medic Music

34 inch scale, stainless steel frets, Active EMG P/Js in soapbar housing. Currently strung with DR Hi Beam 45-105 Strings.
Absolutely dog walks metal and rock tones. But the P/J pick ups are about as versatile as you can get for whatever tones you’re after.

Includes an ESP brand hard case that was not originally for this bass, the original foam body section of the case was removed to accommodate the reverse offset body of the Phoenix, and square Foam pad is inside to support it.

Light gigging history. Superficial scratches to a tuner bushing.

item.title: USED 2022 Fender Aerodyne Jazz Bass MIJ -Black — $700
item.description:
$700 · Very Good · Rockin' Robbie's Music

Aerodyne Jazz Bass, Rosewood Stained Fingerboard, Black, No Pickguard

item.title: Ibanez BTB846F-DTL Standard 2019 - Deep Twilight Low Gloss — $1,186.03
item.description:
$1,186.03 · Very Good · Cristian's Gear Collection

SOLD AS SEEN IN THE PICTURES

I package all instruments I sell to be able to take a beating during shipping so you can purchase with confidence!

Included for free with the purchase:

(1) Toolkit,

(2) Ibanez PowerPad

(3) soft case

(4) Ibanez strap

(5) original manual


Very short production run so these basses are rare.

Professionally set up with low, fast action and big, powerful tone.

very good condition with light playing wear.


Rigid beautiful 5-piece maple/walnut neck construction, Bartolini pickups & Ibanez preamp with mid frequency switch.

Excellent sustain and resonance, Tight bottom end, punchy midrange pressence, smooth response, Beautiful wood grain, produces bright tones.

item.title: modulus flea bass 5 string — $4,000
item.description:
$4,000 · Excellent · blake's Gear Emporium

All original parts and original bartolini pickup

item.title: dunable jm4 — $4,500
item.description:
$4,500 · Excellent · blake's Gear Emporium

Limited Jeff matz

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003AC Al Cisneros Signature 2019 - 2020 Natural — $5,000
item.description:
$5,000 · Excellent · blake's Gear Emporium

Absolute rare and belter of bass.

item.title: BC Rich Warlock Bass w/ Soft Case — $690
item.description:
$690 · Fair · Waterview Music

For sale is a beautiful BC Rich Warlock bass in a red finish. This instrument is in fair preowned condition, and has been set up/ assessed by our in-house guitar. Everything is functioning as it should. According to the consigner, this is the made in Japan model. Comes with a soft case. Please assess ALL photos before purchasing.

item.title: Fender Flea Artist Series Road Worn Signature Jazz Bass 2016 - Present - Shell Pink — $1,030
item.description:
$1,030 · Very Good · E. J. Sommer & Co.

This bass has been a really great part of my gear for the last couple of years. In very good condition; everything works just as it should. My phase of life has changed, and I just don't get to use it as much as I would like to. Pretty sad to see it go, but happy for it to have a new home with someone who will love it. Message me with any questions, I'd be happy to answer them!

item.title: Used Aria Pro II SB Elite 1 Cliff Burton Signature Bass 1 of 250 #CB130751052 — $6,799
item.description:
$6,799 · Excellent · Thunder Road Guitars PDX

Freshly inspected and set up in-house by our esteemed Guitar Tech. In Excellent condition with minimal wear, including light scratches and other signs of normal handling and use. See below for more details and specifications.

FROM ARIA:

A tribute to the legend. The Aria Pro II Cliff Lee Burton Signature Bass faithfully recreates the iconic SB-1000 that Cliff used during the early days of Metallica, the bass that helped define a generation of heavy music. Every detail has been carefully restored to capture the tone, feel, and appearance of Cliff’s original instrument. From the distinctive body shape and high-output active circuit to the solid neck through construction, this limited edition model delivers the unmistakable punch and sustain that made the SB series legendary. More than just a collector’s piece, this is a fully functional instrument built to perform, honoring Cliff’s uncompromising musicianship and the enduring legacy he left behind.

SPECIFICATIONS:

Gold Aria Pro Tuners

Cliff Burton Signature Inscription on Back of Headstock

1 5/8” Brass Nut

Maple and Walnut Neck-Through Body with 34” Scale Length

Neck Thickness .84" at First Fret and .98" at Twelfth Fret

Rosewood Fingerboard with Cat Eye Inlays and 7.25" Radius

24 Jumbo Frets in Excellent Condition

1 Aria Pro Humbucking Pickup with Coil Split Switch

Black and Gold Bridge and Tailpiece 

Ash Body in Black Gloss Finish

Weight 9 lb 5 oz

Original Hard Shell Ostrich Leather Case with Certificate of Authenticity

Serial Number CB130751052

NOTE TO OUR VALUED CUSTOMERS:

We want you to be happy with your purchase and we try to represent the condition of all used and vintage guitars as accurately as possible in our listings. Every used guitar shows some signs of play wear and vintage models even more so. We call out all areas of damage or unusual wear, and describe the overall condition based upon what is "normal" for the age of the instrument. Expect to see minor dings, finish checking, or other evidence of normal use and aging which may not be captured by photography or explicitly mentioned in the listing. 

We recognize that everyone has their own personal standard of what constitutes acceptable wear and tear. If play wear is especially critical for you, please contact us to ask any questions you may have. Your satisfaction is of paramount importance to us.

item.title: Conklin multi-scaled 8- string fretless — $2,750
item.description:
$2,750 · Excellent · Frederick Machine

1998 Conklin Custom 8 string fretless multi-scale bass


This has a single pickup slammed against the saddles, and a volume knob. Super minimal and just raging.

This bass is one-of-a-kind, it’s simply gotten too heavy for me.

item.title: Devon J5 Modern (USED) — $1,299.99
item.description:
$1,299.99 · Good · Allen Music Shop

This item has various signs of use (Dings, dents, scratches, swirls, hardware patina, discoloration of finish, etc.), but is fully functional and plays/sounds great. With gig bag.

Weight: 9.24 lbs

item.title: Chapman Stick SB8 2011 - Paduak — $3,500
item.description:
$3,500 · Excellent · Owner

Chapman Stick Bass SB8, #6035

Padauk wood, standard tuning (can also be tuned to Guitar Intervals), medium/heavy gauge, PASV-4, combo tuners, turquoise guitar dot inlays.

Included is the SKB Hard Shell Flight Case w/keys, Neck Strap, 20' CBI stereo cable, Extra set of Heavy Gauge Strings, Ultimate Stick Stand, and wooden Lab Bar. Everything you need in one box.

item.title: Maruszczyk Elwood L5a — $2,312.75
item.description:
$2,312.75 · Excellent · Gianluca's Shop

Maruszczyk Elwood L5a-24 – Excellent Condition – Delano Electronics – 3.73 kg

I am selling my Maruszczyk Elwood L5a-24 5-string bass in Transparent Red with a beautiful flamed maple top and matching headstock.

The bass is used but in excellent condition. It has been played very little, has always been carefully stored in its original gig bag and has never been abused. Everything works perfectly and there are no functional issues.

This is a lightweight instrument, weighing only 3.73 kg, making it extremely comfortable for long rehearsals and live performances.

Specifications

  • 5 Strings
  • 24 Frets
  • Alder body with resonance chambers
  • Flamed Maple Top
  • Hard Rock Maple Neck
  • Maple Fingerboard
  • Delano Xtender Humbucker + Split Pickup
  • Delano Active/Passive Electronics
  • Series / Parallel / Single Coil Switching
  • Mid Frequency Selector (300 / 500 Hz)
  • Bolt-On Construction
  • Weight: 3.73 kg

The Delano electronics provide an exceptionally wide tonal range, from vintage passive sounds to modern, powerful active tones.

Included

  • Original Maruszczyk Gig Bag

The bass is ready to play and needs nothing.

Feel free to contact me for additional photos or any further information.

Worldwide shipping available at buyer’s expense.

item.title: Epiphone Ripper Bass Limited Edition Custom Shop — $1,174.17
item.description:
$1,174.17 · Excellent · Francesco's Emporio Musicale

The Epiphone Ripper Limited Edition was a reissue inspired by the classic 1970s Gibson Ripper/Grabber family of basses. It was produced as part of Epiphone's "Custom Shop" very limited-run program between 2006–2007 for the natural finish. Crafted in Korea.

This exemplar is among the earliest, built in May 2006. A true musician and collector’s gem.

The bass is in mint state. No bumps, scratches or nicks. Original pick ups and electronics. Straight neck. The instrument works perfectly and delivers the expected strong aggressive tone. The P/J configuration enables a wide tonal variety, from a Gibson-esque thickness to a P-Bass growl. The bass has a unique liveliness, delivering every single ounce of sound thanks to the brass nut and the high mass bridge. The high level of craftsmanship makes this instrument a pleasure to play.

Tailored case (produced for the bass) is included.


Construction & Specifications

-Hard maple body

-Large double-cutaway "Ripper" shape

-Bolt-on construction

-Hard maple neck and maple fingerboard

-Satin-finished neck rear

-High-gloss fingerboard finish

-Brass nut

-High mass bridge

-34" scale length

-1.65" nut width


Electronics

-Split-coil (Precision-style) neck pickup

-Single-coil Jazz-style bridge pickup

-Two volume controls and master tone control

-3-way pickup selector switch

item.title: Ibanez SRH500F Fretless Bass — $560
item.description:
$560 · Very Good · Occultas artes musicae

Ibanez SRH500F Fretless bass in great shape.

New flatwound strings(oem brand/type). Plays awesome with terrific action. Comes with soft case.

A few dings and marks that can be seen in the pictures, but overall in great condition.

Please let me know if you have any questions or want more pictures.

Will be packed with great care for shipping.

item.title: 2021 Fender Custom Shop '60 Jazz Bass Relic - Ocean Turquoise — $3,300
item.description:
$3,300 · Excellent · James' Bass Depot

For your consideration is this 2021 Fender Custom Shop '60 Jazz Bass Relic in a gorgeous ocean turquoise finish.  The CS team did a remarkable job on the relicing process (wear down to the wood and undercoat, various chips in the fnish, aged patina on other parts), this bass looks and feels like it has been gigged for the past almost 70 years.  And when you plug it in and play it, this is (IMO) the best sounding J bass I've ever played.  The early 60s era Jazz controls allow you to dial in a deep pallete of tones.

I'm the first owner of this bass, and it has not left my studio.  The bass is in like new condition.  All finish wear originated with the Custom Shop relecing process.  All components are in perfect working order.  The bass is Fender CS stock -- no modifications made.  Bass weights 9 pounds, 6 ounces.

The bass will ship in the original Fender CS G&G black tolex case, as pictured.  Like the bass, the case is also in like new condition.  Included in the case will be the CS Certificate of Authenticity, Shop Floor Traveler Sheet, chrome pickup covers and mounting screws, thumb rest and mounting screws, CS leather strap, and hang tags.

item.title: 1993 Gibson LPB-2 Les Paul Bass w/Stock Bartolini Pickups #91923709 — $1,309
item.description:
$1,309 · Good · Thunder Road Guitars PDX

Freshly inspected and set up in-house by our esteemed Guitar Tech. In Good condition with noticeable wear for an instrument of this age, including scratches, nicks, fading of finish, and other signs of handling and use. See below for more details and specifications.

SPECIFICATIONS:

All-Original Instrument

Schaller Tuners

1 5/8” Synthetic Nut

Mahogany Neck with 34” Scale Length

Neck Thickness .81" at First Fret and .97" at Twelfth Fret

Ebony Fingerboard with Dot Inlays and 12" Radius

20 Large Frets in Very Good Condition

2 Bartolini Humbucking Pickups

Schaller Roller Bridge

Mahogany Body in Black Gloss Finish

Weight 8 lb 13 oz

Non-Original Epiphone Hard Shell Case

Serial Number 91923709

NOTE TO OUR VALUED CUSTOMERS:

We want you to be happy with your purchase and we try to represent the condition of all used and vintage guitars as accurately as possible in our listings. Every used guitar shows some signs of play wear and vintage models even more so. We call out all areas of damage or unusual wear, and describe the overall condition based upon what is "normal" for the age of the instrument. Expect to see minor dings, finish checking, or other evidence of normal use and aging which may not be captured by photography or explicitly mentioned in the listing. 

We recognize that everyone has their own personal standard of what constitutes acceptable wear and tear. If play wear is especially critical for you, please contact us to ask any questions you may have. Your satisfaction is of paramount importance to us.

item.title: Yamaha Attitude Limited 3 Billy Sheehan Signature 2010s - Black — $2,200
item.description:
$2,200 · Very Good · PhillyFunk’s Gear Shop

Selling my beloved Attitude 3. Excellent condition. What an amazing and versatile bass. Bought in 2015. 9.2 lbs. 

Currently strung with flats, which is actually super cool. This bass can really do anything.

There are some small superficial scratches I tried to capture in the pics. The piano black finish makes it hard to photograph.

Other than those it is in perfect condition. Plays great. I have the paperwork and OHSC as well.

Ships free CONUS. I’m just not playing it much and really trying to downsize a collection that got way too big over the years.

item.title: Squier Sonic® Bronco Bass - Daphne Blue — $259.99
item.description:
$259.99 · Brand New · Wolf Music Company

Squier Sonic® Bronco Bass - Daphne Blue

item.title: Harmony H22 Bass 1960s - Sunburst — $600
item.description:
$600 · Non Functioning · Dukes Vintage

Vintage Harmony H-22 Bass currently in need of some love. It is clean overall but has two significant issues: no output whatsoever, and the neck is bowed causing high action. I have tried to adjust the truss rod with no effect. Additionally after working the control for some time I could hear low output but in my opinion the problem lies with the tine switch. The pick guard is a reproduction and the tuners are vintage waffle style Grover’s. It does not have a case but will be packed with card to ensure safe arrival.

item.title: ESP LTD B-1004 Deluxe ~2022 - Natural Satin — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Excellent · Bad Medic Music

~2022 ESP LTD B-1004 Deluxe. 34" scale, currently strung with new Ernie Ball Hybrid Slinky 45-105. Nordstrand Big Split neck and bridge pickups. Active 3 band preamp.

Plays excellently, sounds killer from funk and jazz to metal. Price includes ESP brand hardcase, form fitted for B series basses.

Never gigged, studio only. One pickup screw is wearing down, but still good to go.

item.title: 🎸5 String Glarry "EyeBuzz" S Style Electric Bass Guitar +Rosewood Fretboard Soft +Case/Gig Bag +Strap+Cable +Pick!🎸 — $185
item.description:
$185 · Brand New · Leo Blacks Music Shack

****I honor 100% of ALL refund requests PLUS return shipping!****

Check out my Reverb shop for more colors and styles!

Hi! I’m Leo Black, owner of Leo Black's Music Shack, and whether you're playing alone, with friends, family, at church, or on stage, you'll always sound AND look good with one of these beauties!

She's a sleek copy of the “Eye Buzz S Series” basses, and she sounds every bit as good as she looks! She's got 2 thick, strong, humbuckers, so you'll never be looking for more bottom end from your bass. You'll have the ladies dancin' and the guys headbangin' til the sun comes up!

My story: COVID shut down my Live Music Production company, ICVMproductions, :( so we opened our on-line store to help raise the funds needed to bring her back to life, so all of the store's profits are going right back into supporting local music!

Thanks for checking out my ad, and, If you have any questions, just ask!

~ Leo

****I honor 100% of ALL refund requests PLUS return shipping!****

.

item.title: Dean Edge 09 4-String Bass Guitar Classic Black — $161.49
item.description:

item.title: Mint Gibson Non-Reverse Thunderbird Bass Guitar - Sparkling Burgundy — $2,399
item.description:
$2,399 · Mint · Palen Music Center

Gibson Non-Reverse Thunderbird Bass Guitar - Sparkling Burgundy

Ever since it was first released back in 1965, the Non-Reverse Thunderbird has been THE choice for forward-looking bassists who want to make their own path and steadfastly refuse to follow the crowd. The Non-Reverse Thunderbird's distinctive styling and huge, thunderous tone make it a standout on stage and in the studio. Now you have the opportunity to make one of these relatively rare 'birds your own with the release of the new Gibson USA Non-Reverse Thunderbird. Equipped with a Non-Reverse mahogany body and a mahogany neck with a rosewood fretboard and 20 medium jumbo frets, each of the two Thunderbird pickups has a volume control, allowing you to use them separately or to blend them in any amount you prefer. A master tone control rounds out the simple yet highly effective control layout. The three-ply white pickguard features the iconic Thunderbird graphic. The Non-Reverse Thunderbird is equipped with a Graph Tech® nut. A three-point adjustable bridge provides a full range of adjustment for action and intonation, while Hipshot® Ultralite® tuning machines hold down the strings at the other end and deliver accurate and stable tuning while keeping headstock weight low to improve balance. A hardshell case is included.

Why Buy A Guitar From Palen Music Center?

Palen Music Center has a wide range of unique guitars to enhance the sound of your music! We have been trusted by musicians across the country since 1963 and are constantly working to provide the best value for our customers. With the addition of our new PLEK machine and our longtime veteran luthiers, we are pleased to provide top-quality guitar repair. 

Specifications
  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed
  • Body Shape:Non-reverse Thunderbird
  • Body Material:Mahogany
  • Body Finish:Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer
  • Color:Sparkling Burgundy
  • Neck Material:Mahogany
  • Neck Shape:Rounded C
  • Radius:12"
  • Fingerboard Material:Indian Rosewood
  • Fingerboard Inlay:Dots
  • Number of Frets:20, Medium Jumbo
  • Scale Length:34"
  • Nut Width:1.6"
  • Nut Material:Graph Tech NuBone
  • Bridge/Tailpiece:3-Point Adjustable
  • Tuners:Hipshot Ultralite
  • Neck Pickup:Thunderbird Rhythm Humbucker
  • Bridge Pickup:Thunderbird Lead Humbucker
  • Controls:2 x volume, 1 x master tone
  • Strings:Gibson, .045-.105
  • Case Included:Hardshell Case
  • Manufacturer Part Number:BANT00VNCH1
  • Depth at 1st Fret: .882"
  • Depth at 12th Fret: 1.019"

The instrument pictured is the exact instrument you’ll receive. All fretted instruments receive a free complimentary professional setup.

Please feel free to reach out to our knowledgeable sales staff with any additional questions!

item.title: Mint Sterling by Music Man SB14 Sterling Bass - Blue Pearl — $749.99
item.description:
$749.99 · Mint · Palen Music Center

Sterling by Music Man SB14 Sterling Bass - Blue Pearl

The Sterling by Music Man SB14 Bass in Blue Pearl is a modern passive powerhouse that channels the essence of its iconic U.S.-made Music Man lineage. If you’re looking for a bass that cuts through the mix with vintage thump and clarity without the fuss of active electronics, this is your groove machine. Its foundation is a resonant soft maple body, known for delivering a tight low end and articulate highs, making it comfortable for long sets and tonally balanced across genres.

The tone is driven by a single Alnico V parallel humbucker—the classic configuration designed to produce exceptional warmth and dynamic response. This pickup setup is streamlined through simple master volume and tone controls, giving you direct, no-nonsense access to a full-bodied voice that holds steady for rock, funk, jazz, and everything in between. The SB14 carries the torch of the original Sterling, a model known for its slightly smaller body and neck profile that many players find faster and more comfortable than its contemporaries. It stands as a testament to the classic Sterling design, a legacy utilized by iconic players on the original model, such as Colin Greenwood of Radiohead. This is pure, unadulterated bass tone, ready to plug in and rumble.

Why Buy A Guitar From Palen Music Center?

Palen Music Center has a wide range of unique guitars to enhance the sound of your music! We have been trusted by musicians across the country since 1963 and are constantly working to provide the best value for our customers. With the addition of our new PLEK machine and our longtime veteran luthiers, we are pleased to provide top-quality guitar repair.

Highlights

  • Passive powerhouse tone delivered by a single Alnico V humbucker.

  • Resonant soft maple body for comfort and focused tonal balance.

  • Fan-favorite smaller Sterling body and slim neck profile for lightning-fast playability.

  • Classic 2-knob layout (Volume/Tone) for straightforward, versatile sound control.

  • Stunning, stage-ready Blue Pearl finish with a rock-solid 5-bolt hard maple neck.

Specifications

  • Body Wood: Soft Maple

  • Neck Wood: Hard Maple

  • Left/Right Handed: Right-Handed

  • Fretboard Wood: Rosewood

  • Scale Length: 34” (86.4cm)

  • Fretboard Radius: 9.5" (24 cm)

  • Fretboard Inlay/Material: White Dot Markers / Polyphenylene Sulfide Nut

  • Neck Profile: Fan-Favorite Slim Profile

  • Finish: Gloss Blue Pearl (Body)

  • Hardware: Chrome

  • Tuners: Open Gear

  • Bridge Pickup: H - 1 Alnico V Humbucker

  • Electronics: Passive (Master Volume, Master Tone)

  • Bridge: Sterling by Music Man-Designed Bridge

  • Manufacturer Part Number: ST-SB14-BLP-R1

All fretted instruments receive a free complimentary professional setup. Please feel free to reach out to our knowledgeable sales staff with any additional questions!

item.title: Mint Fender Custom Shop Bass VI Journeyman Relic - Purple Sparkle over Graffiti Yellow — $7,640
item.description:
$7,640 · Mint · Palen Music Center

Fender Custom Shop Bass VI Journeyman Relic - Purple Sparkle over Graffiti Yellow

Step into a world of sonic possibility with this exceptional Fender Custom Shop Bass VI. More than a bass and more than a baritone guitar, this unique 6-string instrument is a true sonic chameleon, perfectly blending the deep punch of a bass with the melodic potential of a guitar. Crafted with a classic two-piece alder body—the very tonewood foundation that defines so many iconic Fender sounds—it delivers a balanced resonance with crystal-clear highs and muscular lows. The maple neck and rich rosewood fingerboard, carved to a comfortable 60s style Oval "C" profile, feel instantly familiar, inviting both bassists and guitarists to explore its 30-inch short scale.

The heart of this Bass VI's versatile tone lies in its trio of period-correct '62 Jaguar Neck/Bridge Flat Magnet Relic single-coil pickups. This powerful configuration provides a vast tonal palette, from classic surf-rock twang and deep, earthy bass lines to bright, chiming chords that cut through any mix. The iconic switching system lets you activate each pickup independently, offering a massive array of tonal combinations, including the classic 'strangle' switch (a low-cut filter) to thin out the sound for more defined lead work. This instrument doesn't just replicate history—it was used to write it, gracing the hands of legends like Robert Smith of The Cure, Joe Perry of Aerosmith, and even members of The Beatles (George Harrison and John Lennon), showcasing its incredible versatility across genres from surf to post-punk to heavy rock.

Finished in a dazzling, custom Purple Sparkle lacquer, masterfully applied over a Graffiti Yellow base coat, and treated with a Journeyman Relic finish, this Bass VI possesses the unmistakable look and feel of a well-loved, gently aged classic. The aging process gives it the vibe of a guitar that's been played on countless gigs but meticulously cared for, complete with authentic finish checking and subtle wear, allowing the vibrant yellow to subtly peek through the purple sparkle finish. The combination of its distinctive aesthetic, premium tonewoods, and unique electronics makes this Custom Shop Bass VI an inspiring instrument ready for studio work or stage performance, offering a low-end voice unlike anything else.

Why Buy A Guitar From Palen Music Center?

Palen Music Center has a wide range of unique guitars to enhance the sound of your music! We have been trusted by musicians across the country since 1963 and are constantly working to provide the best value for our customers. With the addition of our new PLEK machine and our longtime veteran luthiers, we are pleased to provide top-quality guitar repair.

Highlights

  • Striking, custom Purple Sparkle finish applied over a vibrant Graffiti Yellow base coat for a truly unique look.

  • Journeyman Relic aging provides the authentic feel and vibe of a well-loved vintage instrument.

  • Classic Alder body provides a balanced, resonant foundation for deep bass and clear, articulate melody.

  • Trio of Custom Shop '62 Jaguar Flat Magnet Relic Single-Coil Pickups deliver chime, punch, and an extensive tonal range.

  • Unique 6-string short-scale 30" design allows for complex chord voicings and melodic lead lines in the bass register.

Specifications

  • Body Wood: Alder

  • Neck Wood: Maple 

  • Left/Right Handed: Right Hand

  • Fretboard Wood: Rosewood

  • Scale Length: 30"

  • Fretboard Radius: 7.25"

  • Fretboard Inlay/Material: Micarta White 250 dots

  • Neck Profile: 60 Style Oval "C"

  • Finish: Lacquer (Body), Nitrocellulose Lacquer (Neck)

  • Hardware: Chrome/Nickel Hardware

  • Tuners: Vintage Style w/ Fender Logo Relic

  • Neck Pickup: 62 JAG NK FLAT MAGNETS REL Single Coil

  • Middle Pickup: 62 JAG BRDG FLAT MAGNETS REL Single Coil

  • Bridge Pickup: 62 JAG BRDG FLAT MAGNETS REL Single Coil

  • Electronics: Master Volume, Master Tone, Three Pickup On/Off Switches, One Low Cut ("Strangle") Switch

  • Bridge: Adjustable Jaguar/Jazzmaster Bridge with Floating Tremolo

  • Manufacturer Part Number: 9231016909

  • Depth at 1st Fret: .840"

  • Depth at 12th Fret: .920"

The instrument pictured is the exact instrument you’ll receive. All fretted instruments receive a free complimentary professional setup. Please feel free to reach out to our knowledgeable sales staff with any additional questions!
